    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}

.croppie-container .cr-image {
    z-index: -1;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    transform-origin: 0 0;
    max-height: none;
    max-width: none;
}

.croppie-container .cr-boundary {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin: 0 auto;
    z-index: 1;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}

.croppie-container .cr-viewport,
.croppie-container .cr-resizer {
    position: absolute;
    border: 2px solid #fff;
    margin: auto;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    right: 0;
    left: 0;
    box-shadow: 0 0 2000px 2000px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    z-index: 0;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer {
  z-index: 2;
  box-shadow: none;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-vertical,
.croppie-container .cr-resizer-horisontal {
  position: absolute;
  pointer-events: all;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-vertical::after,
.croppie-container .cr-resizer-horisontal::after {
    display: block;
    position: absolute;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    border: 1px solid black;
    background: #fff;
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    content: '';
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-vertical {
  bottom: -5px;
  cursor: row-resize;
  width: 100%;
  height: 10px;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-vertical::after {
    left: 50%;
    margin-left: -5px;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-horisontal {
  right: -5px;
  cursor: col-resize;
  width: 10px;
  height: 100%;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-horisontal::after {
    top: 50%;
    margin-top: -5px;
}

.croppie-container .cr-original-image {
    display: none;
}

.croppie-container .cr-vp-circle {
    border-radius: 50%;
}

.croppie-container .cr-overlay {
    z-index: 1;
    position: absolute;
    cursor: move;
    touch-action: none;
}

.croppie-container .cr-slider-wrap {
    width: 75%;
    margin: 15px auto;
    text-align: center;
}

.croppie-result {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.croppie-result img {
    position: absolute;
}

.croppie-container .cr-image,
.croppie-container .cr-overlay,
.croppie-container .cr-viewport {
    -webkit-transform: translateZ(0);
    -moz-transform: translateZ(0);
    -ms-transform: translateZ(0);
    transform: translateZ(0);
}

/*************************************/
/***** STYLING RANGE INPUT ***********/
/*************************************/
/*http://brennaobrien.com/blog/2014/05/style-input-type-range-in-every-browser.html */
/*************************************/

.cr-slider {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
/*removes default webkit styles*/
	/*border: 1px solid white; *//*fix for FF unable to apply focus style bug */
    width: 300px;
/*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
    max-width: 100%;
    padding-top: 8px;
    padding-bottom: 8px;
    background-color: transparent;
}

.cr-slider::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
    width: 100%;
    height: 3px;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    border: 0;
    border-radius: 3px;
}

.cr-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    border: none;
    height: 16px;
    width: 16px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #ddd;
    margin-top: -6px;
}

.cr-slider:focus {
    outline: none;
}
/*
.cr-slider:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
background: #ccc;
}
*/

.cr-slider::-moz-range-track {
    width: 100%;
    height: 3px;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    border: 0;
    border-radius: 3px;
}

.cr-slider::-moz-range-thumb {
    border: none;
    height: 16px;
    width: 16px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #ddd;
    margin-top: -6px;
}

/*hide the outline behind the border*/
.cr-slider:-moz-focusring {
    outline: 1px solid white;
    outline-offset: -1px;
}

.cr-slider::-ms-track {
    width: 100%;
    height: 5px;
    background: transparent;
/*remove bg colour from the track, we'll use ms-fill-lower and ms-fill-upper instead */
	border-color: transparent;/*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
	border-width: 6px 0;
	color: transparent;/*remove default tick marks*/
}
.cr-slider::-ms-fill-lower {
	background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
	border-radius: 10px;
}
.cr-slider::-ms-fill-upper {
	background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
	border-radius: 10px;
}
.cr-slider::-ms-thumb {
	border: none;
	height: 16px;
	width: 16px;
	border-radius: 50%;
	background: #ddd;
	margin-top:1px;
}
.cr-slider:focus::-ms-fill-lower {
	background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}
.cr-slider:focus::-ms-fill-upper {
	background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}
/*******************************************/

/***********************************/
/* Rotation Tools */
/***********************************/
.cr-rotate-controls {
	position: absolute;
	bottom: 5px;
	left: 5px;
	z-index: 1;
}
.cr-rotate-controls button {
	border: 0;
	background: none;
}
.cr-rotate-controls i:before {
	display: inline-block;
	font-style: normal;
	font-weight: 900;
	font-size: 22px;
}
.cr-rotate-l i:before {
	content: '↺';
}
.cr-rotate-r i:before {
	content: '↻';
}

    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;

.croppie-container .cr-image {
    z-index: -1;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    transform-origin: 0 0;
    max-height: none;
    max-width: none;
}

.croppie-container .cr-boundary {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin: 0 auto;
    z-index: 1;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}

.croppie-container .cr-viewport,
.croppie-container .cr-resizer {
    position: absolute;
    border: 2px solid #fff;
    margin: auto;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    right: 0;
    left: 0;
    box-shadow: 0 0 2000px 2000px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    z-index: 0;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer {
  z-index: 2;
  box-shadow: none;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-vertical,
.croppie-container .cr-resizer-horisontal {
  position: absolute;
  pointer-events: all;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-vertical::after,
.croppie-container .cr-resizer-horisontal::after {
    display: block;
    position: absolute;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    border: 1px solid black;
    background: #fff;
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    content: '';
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-vertical {
  bottom: -5px;
  cursor: row-resize;
  width: 100%;
  height: 10px;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-vertical::after {
    left: 50%;
    margin-left: -5px;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-horisontal {
  right: -5px;
  cursor: col-resize;
  width: 10px;
  height: 100%;
}

.croppie-container .cr-resizer-horisontal::after {
    top: 50%;
    margin-top: -5px;
}

.croppie-container .cr-original-image {
    display: none;
}

.croppie-container .cr-vp-circle {
    border-radius: 50%;
}

.croppie-container .cr-overlay {
    z-index: 1;
    position: absolute;
    cursor: move;
    touch-action: none;
}

.croppie-container .cr-slider-wrap {
    width: 75%;
    margin: 15px auto;
    text-align: center;
}

.croppie-result {
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.croppie-result img {
    position: absolute;
}

.croppie-container .cr-image,
.croppie-container .cr-overlay,
.croppie-container .cr-viewport {
    -webkit-transform: translateZ(0);
    -moz-transform: translateZ(0);
    -ms-transform: translateZ(0);
    transform: translateZ(0);
}

/*************************************/
/***** STYLING RANGE INPUT ***********/
/*************************************/
/*http://brennaobrien.com/blog/2014/05/style-input-type-range-in-every-browser.html */
/*************************************/

.cr-slider {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
/*removes default webkit styles*/
	/*border: 1px solid white; *//*fix for FF unable to apply focus style bug */
    width: 300px;
/*required for proper track sizing in FF*/
    max-width: 100%;
    padding-top: 8px;
    padding-bottom: 8px;
    background-color: transparent;
}

.cr-slider::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
    width: 100%;
    height: 3px;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    border: 0;
    border-radius: 3px;
}

.cr-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    border: none;
    height: 16px;
    width: 16px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #ddd;
    margin-top: -6px;
}

.cr-slider:focus {
    outline: none;
}
/*
.cr-slider:focus::-webkit-slider-runnable-track {
background: #ccc;
}
*/

.cr-slider::-moz-range-track {
    width: 100%;
    height: 3px;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    border: 0;
    border-radius: 3px;
}

.cr-slider::-moz-range-thumb {
    border: none;
    height: 16px;
    width: 16px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #ddd;
    margin-top: -6px;
}

/*hide the outline behind the border*/
.cr-slider:-moz-focusring {
    outline: 1px solid white;
    outline-offset: -1px;
}

.cr-slider::-ms-track {
    width: 100%;
    height: 5px;
    background: transparent;
/*remove bg colour from the track, we'll use ms-fill-lower and ms-fill-upper instead */
	border-color: transparent;/*leave room for the larger thumb to overflow with a transparent border */
	border-width: 6px 0;
	color: transparent;/*remove default tick marks*/
}
.cr-slider::-ms-fill-lower {
	background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
	border-radius: 10px;
}
.cr-slider::-ms-fill-upper {
	background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
	border-radius: 10px;
}
.cr-slider::-ms-thumb {
	border: none;
	height: 16px;
	width: 16px;
	border-radius: 50%;
	background: #ddd;
	margin-top:1px;
}
.cr-slider:focus::-ms-fill-lower {
	background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}
.cr-slider:focus::-ms-fill-upper {
	background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
}

.cr-rotate-controls {
	position: absolute;
	bottom: 5px;
	left: 5px;
	z-index: 1;
}
.cr-rotate-controls button {
	border: 0;
	background: none;
}
.cr-rotate-controls i:before {
	display: inline-block;
	font-style: normal;
	font-weight: 900;
	font-size: 22px;
}
.cr-rotate-l i:before {
	content: '↺';
}
.cr-rotate-r i:before {
	content: '↻';
}

<script>
    var documentID;
    var documentURL;

    function isDocumentPrivateModalRequired() {
        if ("1") {
            // Old user, don't show modal
            return false;
        }

        if ($("#yp-edit-document-form").hasClass("d-none")) {
            // No edit form, don't show modal
            return false;
        }

        if ($('#yp-privacy-mode').length && $('#yp-privacy-mode').val() !== "private") {
            // Document is not private, don't show modal
            return false;
        }

        if (!$('#edit_id').val() && !documentID) {
            // No document id, don't show modal
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    function showPrivacyModal(showStep1, document) {
        $("#yp-privacy-modal__step1").toggle(showStep1);
        $("#yp-privacy-modal__step2").toggle(!showStep1);

        $("#dpm__point-1").toggleClass("active", showStep1);
        $("#dpm__point-2").toggleClass("active", !showStep1);

        if (!showStep1 && document) {
            setupDocumentFields(document)
        }
        trackView(showStep1);
        $('#yp-document-privacy-modal').modal('show');
    }

    function trackView(isStep1) {
        if (isStep1) return;
        const isFreeUser = false;
        InternalTracking.track({
            event: 'view',
            custom_key: isFreeUser ? 'published_modal_free' : 'published_modal_other',
        });
    }

    function hidePrivacyModal(update = false) {
        if (update) {
            updateMagazinePrivacy();
        }
        $('#yp-document-privacy-modal').modal('hide');
    }

    function navigateAway(to) {
        window.location = to;
    }

    function setupDocumentFields(document) {
        documentID = document.id;
        documentURL = document.secure_url_with_title;
        $("#dpm__input-link").attr("value", documentURL);
        $("#dpm__view-link").attr("href", documentURL);
        $("#dpm__embed-link").attr("href", documentURL + "#embed");
        setupSocialLinks(document);
    }

    function updateMagazinePrivacy() {
        if (typeof update_magazine !== 'function') {
            return
        }
        $.when(update_magazine('privacy_mode')).done(function (res) {
            var response = $.parseJSON(res);
            if (response.success) {
                availibility_options();
            } else {
                $('#yp-visibility-settings-section').find('.yp-js-change-availability-notifier').removeClass('d-none');
                setTimeout(function () {
                    $('.yp-js-change-availability-notifier').addClass('d-none');
                }, 3200);
            }
        });
    }

    function copyUrlToClipboard() {
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(documentURL);

        var notifier = $('.yp-get-notifier-success').html();
        $(notifier).appendTo('.yp-notification-block').removeClass('d-none');
        $('.yp-notification-block').find('.yp-success-msg').html("Copied successfully!");
        hide_notifier();
    }

    function setupSocialLinks(document) {
        if (!document.settings?.site_social_sharing) {
            $("#dpm__share").css("visibility", "hidden");
            return;
        }
        $("#dpm__share").css("visibility", "visible");
        var links = {
            facebook: `https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=${encodeURIComponent(document.secure_url_with_title)}&t=${encodeURIComponent(document.title + ": " + document.description)}`,
            linkedin: `https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=${encodeURIComponent(document.secure_url_with_title)}&title=${encodeURIComponent(document.title + ": " + document.description)}&source=${encodeURIComponent(document.secure_url_with_title)}`,
            twitter: `https://x.com/intent/tweet?text=${encodeURIComponent(document.title + ", " + "a interesting magazine found on Yumpu.com -" + document.secure_url_with_title + "via @yumpu_com")}&via=yumpu_com&related=youbuy_com`,
            pinterest: `https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=${encodeURIComponent(document.secure_url_with_title)}&media=${encodeURIComponent(document.secure_pinterest_cover)}&description=${encodeURIComponent(document.pinterest_title + ": " + document.description)}`,
        };
        $("#dpm__socials-facebook").attr("href", links.facebook);
        $("#dpm__socials-linkedin").attr("href", links.linkedin);
        $("#dpm__socials-twitter").attr("href", links.twitter);
        $("#dpm__socials-pinterest").attr("href", links.pinterest);
    }

    $(document).ready(function () {
        $("#dpm__submit").click(function () {
            documentID = documentID ? documentID : $('#edit_id').val();
            if (!documentID) {
                return;
            }
            publish_document(documentID).then((response) => {
                if (response.success) {
                    setupDocumentFields(response.document)
                    $("#yp-privacy-modal__step1").hide();
                    $("#yp-privacy-modal__step2").fadeIn();
                    $("#dpm__point-1").removeClass("active");
                    $("#dpm__point-2").addClass("active");
                }
            });
        })

        $("#dpm__close").click(function () {
            hidePrivacyModal(false);
        })

        $("#dpm__decline").click(function () {
            hidePrivacyModal(true);
        })
    })
</script>

    /**
     * Showing and hiding a modal from within another modal can cause race conditions,
     * preventing the modal-open class from being applied.
     * This ensures that when a modal is shown, the BODY element definitely has the modal-open class,
     * which is necessary for Bootstrap modals to function correctly.
     * This is caused by bootstraps internal code (v4.1.0) and there is no indication for an update in 4.x.x that fixes it.
     */
    $(document).on('shown.bs.modal', function () {
        const body = $('body');
        if (!body.hasClass('modal-open')) {
            body.addClass('modal-open');
        }
    });
    /**
     * When the Popover is clicked it triggers sometimes the blur effect of the input it is bound to
     * which triggers the bootstrap event listener to close the popover.
     * This ensures that when a popover is clicked it does not blur the input it is bound to.
     * This is caused by bootstraps colorpickers internal code (v3.4.0) and we are already using the newest version.
     */
    $(document).on('mousedown', function (e) {
        const target = $(e.target);
        if (target.closest('.popover.colorpicker-bs-popover.show').length) {
            e.preventDefault();
        }
    });
    $(document).on('click', '.chat-now', function() {
        if (typeof window.Intercom !== 'function') {
            return;
        }
        Intercom('show');
    });
</script>
